input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.3.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.3.6
            TITLE: the ams indicator light must be:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.3.6: The AMS Indicator Light must be:
EV.7.3.6 The AMS Indicator Light must be:  
a. Color:  Red  
b. Clearly visible to the seated driver in bright sunlight 
c. Clearly marked with the lettering “AMS”

final_answer: The AMS Indicator Light must be: EV.7.3.6 The AMS Indicator Light must be: a. Color: Red b. Clearly visible to the seated driver in bright sunlight c. Clearly marked with the lettering “AMS”
